column1: # Custom 8 MB partition table with a coredump region for post-mortem
# debugging. After a panic the ESP-IDF panic handler writes a coredump
# blob here; pio extracts it with: pio device monitor + a coredump tool.
#   nvs       16 KB    @ 0x9000     — Preferences / NVS for home location etc.
#   app0     2.75 MB   @ 0x20000    — main firmware (this is what we boot from)
#   spiffs   2.375 MB  @ 0x5A0000   — LittleFS data partition (web UI)
